summary: Building Ionic-based cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android using Angular and TypeScript.

Graduate program at the intersection of AI, robotics, and cognitive systems. Coursework includes Bio-inspired AI, Machine Learning, Computer Vision, Robot Technology, Intelligent Robotics, Knowledge Processing, Biostatistics, and Advanced Software Engineering.

Three years across agile delivery teams on banking security, retail migration, e-commerce, and government public service. Tech-led one engagement, mentored newcomers, and remediated security vulnerabilities at a global bank.
Core coursework in algorithms, linear algebra, probability and statistics, operating systems. Thesis: browser-based multi-layer Gerber file viewer using JavaScript and HTML Canvas.
Analyzed century-long climate datasets and produced geographically-grounded visualizations.
